title: QA Electrical Engineer (Tuas - 5 day)
description:
Responsibilities:-

1. Inspect outgoing parts and incoming sub-contracted parts according to established procedure / specification of inspection and carry out Incoming Process Inspection.

2. Maintain quality record and file quality data.

3. Highlight quality problems discovered to the QA Manager and Factory Manager / Production Manager / Asst. Production Manager for action.

4. Ensure that all non-conforming products are not mixed with good products prior to disposition.

5. Authorise the rejection of parts if found unsatisfactory.

6. Authorise the release of conforming parts to be sent to the store for subsequent delivery to customers.

7. Perform factory routine test and check of switchboards completed in the workshop.

8. Testing and commissioning of switchboards on board vessels or on-site to the satisfaction of customers; and attend to warranty claims / quality complaints.

9. Conduct official tests on the switchboards which require witnessing by surveyors or consultants and also maybe with the presence of customers.

10. Assist the Manager in quality responsibilities and achieving quality objectives.

11. Maintain good housekeeping in the QA Department.

12. Observe and adhere to safety rules during the performance of every task.

13. Ensure the use of calibrated instrument for inspection.

14. Initiate action to prevent the occurrence of Product Non-Conformity.

15. Initiate, recommend or provide solutions to problem detected.

16. Verify the implementation of solutions.

17. Control further processing and delivery of Non-Conforming products until the deficiency has been corrected. 18. Carry out other responsibilities as and when assigned by the superiors.

19. Follow the procedures of Quality Management System for effective implementation and control.


Qualification:

1) Diploma in Electrical Engineering

2) Able to work under stress and meet tight schedule

3) 14 days annual leave, AWS

4) Variable bonus – depend on company & individual performance

5) 28 days medical leave


Applicants who possess relevant experience for the above responsibilities are most welcome to apply. If you do not possess the above experience, your application will still be considered on individual merits and you may be contacted for other opportunities.

Please submit your updated resume in MS Words format by using the APPLY NOW BUTTON

Alternatively, you may send your application and resume in MS Words format to tioman009@gmail.com or Whatsapp to 8767 9648

By submitting your personal data and/or resume, you give consent to collection, use and disclosure of your personal data and/or resume by the company (or its agent) for the purpose of the processing and administration by the company relating to this job application.

**We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates would be notified.

K N Tan
